title: Wordless Wednesday: Cats Keeping Warm
excerpt: Wordless Wednesday: Cats Keeping Warm Trying something new for “Wordless Wednesday”: having less than three paragraphs of words! Lucky and Mabel only JUST started loving each other after 3 years of living together! I hope when the cold weather goes away, their love for snuggles doesn’t!
content:
Wordless Wednesday: Cats Keeping Warm

Trying something new for “Wordless Wednesday”: having less than three paragraphs of words! Lucky and Mabel only

JUST

started loving each other after 3 years of living together! I hope when the cold weather goes away, their love for snuggles doesn’t!
